entry.title: Re: DTPs are not visible in BW/4HANA's standard DataFlow...
entry.content:
Hi 

If you’ve already tried the previous options and the DTPs are still not visible in the Data Flow `/IMO/DF_FIAA_01`, here are a few additional steps you can consider:

1. Recheck DTP Assignment:
Open the DTP configuration directly and verify if it is assigned correctly to the right Data Source and InfoProvider. Ensure that it is part of the data flow in question.

2. Look for Hidden Elements:
In the BW Modeler, ensure that you haven’t inadvertently hidden the DTPs or their parent objects in the graphical view. Sometimes, elements can be collapsed or hidden.

3. Validate the Data Flow:
Use the validation tool in the BW Modeler to check for any inconsistencies or issues within the data flow that could prevent DTPs from being displayed.

4. Check for Transport Issues:
If the data flow was recently transported from another environment, ensure that all objects (including DTPs) were correctly transported. Missing objects can lead to display issues.

5. Explore Alternate Views:
Sometimes, viewing the data flow in different modes (like graphical vs. hierarchical) can reveal hidden DTPs or provide a different perspective on the configuration.

6. Clear Cache:
Clear any application cache or metadata cache that might be affecting visibility. You can do this via transaction codes like `/SAPAPO/RSV1` or similar for BW.

7. Review Documentation:
Check the official SAP documentation for any known issues or additional configuration steps specific to your version of BW/4HANA.

8. SAP Notes:
Look for relevant SAP Notes or KBA (Knowledge Base Articles) that might address similar issues or bugs related to DTP visibility in your specific BW version.

If these additional steps do not resolve the issue, contacting SAP Support with detailed information about the issue, including screenshots and any relevant logs, would be the next best action. They can provide more specialized assistance tailored to your situation.

entry.title: Re: Problems with AppState in FIORI-App on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi

1. Check if Your App is Set Up for FLP-To ensure your app runs within the FLP:

Deployment: Make sure your app is deployed to the FLP environment and not running as a standalone application. This typically means it should be part of the Fiori launchpad's tiles or catalog.

Manifest Configuration: Check your `manifest.json` for the following:
sap.ui5 section should have the `crossNavigation` property set up to indicate the app can be navigated from the FLP.
SAP Fiori Launchpad Configuration: Ensure the app is configured correctly in the FLP's configuration settings.

Launchpad URL: Ensure that when you're accessing your app, you're using the FLP URL (like `https://<your-flp-host>/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/<your_app>`) rather than a direct URL to the app.

2. Check App State Management Setup
To verify if app state management is correctly set up:

Router Configuration: In your `manifest.json`, ensure that the `sap.ui.generic.app` section is correctly configured. Look for:
`routing`: Check that routes and targets are defined properly.
`navigation`: Ensure that the `target` configurations are properly set up for navigating between views.

App State Handling:
In your controller (e.g., the List Report), ensure you are using the `storeInnerAppStateAsync` function where appropriate. This might look like this:
```javascript
onInit: function() {
// Store app state on initialization or relevant event
this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter().getRoute("yourRoute").attachPatternMatched(this.onRouteMatched, this);
},

onRouteMatched: function(oEvent) {
// Logic to store app state
let oAppState = {/* Your app state logic */};
this.getOwnerComponent().getAppStateManager().storeInnerAppStateAsync(oAppState);
}
```
State Retrieval: Make sure you have implemented the logic to retrieve and apply the stored state when the app initializes or the route changes.

Additional Tips:
Browser Console: Use the browser's console to check for any other errors or warnings that might give hints on why the function isn’t recognized.

Documentation: Consult the [SAP Fiori Elements documentation](https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/9e2581ccbe6a4ef4a1a7a308cd06f6b7) for examples on implementing app state management effectively.

entry.title: Re: Converting Excel file data with multiple sheets to an internal table

entry.title: Re: error message at ME21n using user-exit EXIT_SAPMM06E_012
entry.content:
In CHECK method you receive IM_HEADER parameter, with this parameter

  • you can get header condition with GET_CONDITIONS
  • You can get an item list with GET_ITEMS, and for each returned item you can get conditions with GET_CONDITIONS

entry.title: Recipe Development In SAP PLM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need some information regarding the recipe development in SAP S4, if some one can help I really appreciate. 

1. When recipe is under development, in which table this data get store.

2. From where material numbers are get picked when we assign materials to specifications.

3. After synchronizing the recipe to BOM in which table this data gets updated.

4. Which tables recipe development uses for BOM, production version and recipe.

5. Are below tables getting used while recipe development - Eg  STPO, PLPO PLKO, MKAL, CRHD.

Thanks in advance, really appreciate the help.

Rogerio

entry.title: Doubts in pricing Secure Login Service for SAPGUI
entry.content:
Hi community,

We are exploring the Secure Login Service for SAPGUI product, we have a case with 600 hundred users.

In the discovery center i can see this pricing :

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/sap-secure-login-service/?tab=service_plan&service_plan=default&region=all&commercialModel=subscription

Metric --> Users (In Blocks of 500)

Ranges --> Up to 6 

Unit price per month --> EUR 450,00

Does it means that we will have a cost of 900€/month? because we'll need 2 blocks.

Thanks,

Best regards,

Carlos.

entry.title: Re: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content:
Which link was used in the eclipse and with which version? I suggest using the latest eclipse version with the latest link.

  • For Eclipse 2024-09 (4.33), use https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2024-09 or https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

entry.title: Re: Interpreting the Executed Visualization plan in SAP HANA
entry.content: You sir are the real mvp

entry.title: Re: Memory Forecast for SAP HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace
entry.content:
Hi Ray, 

if the indexserver memory consumption is already this high, that the system is labeled with "Already reached", it is not possible to get a forecast with this app. However, you can use the EWA dashboard and click on the Memory Area detail page and trigger a "Datafootprint forecast". This will still be possible and gives you a forecast on how the row store and column store will grow over time.

Best regards,

Susanne

entry.title: Re: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content: Start at the bottom nodes. Data preview each node and check the performance. Then work up though the levels of the view and see where exactly the performance starts to deteriorate. Then you can copy the SQL statement for the node and look for potential improvements. Good/bad response times are relevant to the design of the view and the amount of data being consumed.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

As a first-generation full-time undergraduate student in Computer Science and a proud scholarship recipient, I am deeply committed to continuous learning and personal growth. I'm writing to express my strong interest in participating in the Digital Skills Initiative. My goal is to deepen my expertise in SAP development and cloud technologies, and I see this program as a perfect fit for my aspirations. It represents an excellent opportunity to stay competitive in the fast-evolving tech landscape and to further my career. I am genuinely excited about this initiative and look forward to the possibility of contributing and growing through this experience.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Guided Sourcing RFP - Item Need quotes
entry.content: Hi Samresh, kindly note that an entry in this Section is mandatory when the event rule - "ENABLE MULTIROUND BIDDING" is selected. You can find this rule in the "Event Settings" > "Set Event rules". in the RFP event navigate to top right corner to see the 3 dots to find the settings. Once you unselect, "Enable multi-round bidding" you would be able to publish the event without any item in this section.

Requirement: 1. when i press GO button i want to load few data for STANDARD default variant. OR

                       2. Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button for fiori apps (List Report) created using managed query (CDS views)

Please let me know any hook methods for GO button validation and how to restrict the data to load only few records and display OR Is there a way we can display error messages upon clicking the GO button pass message like "No items found. Check the search and filter settings." for STANDARD variant  

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Returnable Packaging
entry.content:
Hi Vivek, 

thank you so much for the real good article about the Returnable Packaging Process; it really explains well all steps of the process.

I have one question about this part: "Once the Goods has been received Output type gets triggered which will execute a report program. This Report program will create a Process Order and against this Process Order Goods issues of the components and GR of the Combine Material takes place".

Is this a custom report behind the output triggering? Or is there some standard way to manage this Process Order creation and execution to receive the "Combine Material"?

Thank you in advance!

Best Regards

Alessandro

entry.title: Re: BTP Toolbox: App to Backup & Restore HDI Containers
entry.content:
Hi @AlexPJ 

The codeline on Github works with a single Hana DB instance for DEV, QAS and PRD but the mechanism is the same if you have separate instances. You would just have to adjust the code to support multiple instances. After that, it would also be possible to copy the whole HDI container from PRD to DEV.

This is actually a very good feature request 😅 👍

entry.title: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident memory and database used memory
entry.content:
We need help.
We are currently using SAP BTP and are looking for a way to automatically monitor the memory used in the database (database resident memory, database used memory), and send an alert and email when a certain amount of usage is detected.

Here are the specifications:

  • Using HANA Cloud as the database.
  • Currently, each memory is manually monitored from the Memory Usage section in HANA Cockpit.

Since the memory we want to set alerts for is standard, I thought there might be a default alert function, so I looked in HANA Cockpit under alert > alert definition, but I couldn't find it.

I would like to know if this is something that should be implemented by default in the alert definition, or if it is something that users need to create. If we need to create the alert, please let us know the steps to do so (preferably without using SQL commands, if possible).

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: GR error Cost element is not assigned to a cost component in CostCompStruct 10 Message no. MLCCS010
entry.content:
Dear esteemed members,

When posting a Goods Reciept, the following error appears. However, the customer can post the same in Quality. They face this issue in Production. Much appreciate for the help and guidance.

Cost element is not assigned to a cost component in CostCompStruct 10

Message no. MLCCS010

Diagnosis

You have activated the actual cost component split.

No cost component has been assigned to cost element origin group in cost component structure 10 for chart of accounts 1000. The system is unable to assign the value to a cost component.

System Response

You cannot carry out posting.

Procedure

Check whether for this operation the value to be posted is to be assigned to this cost element.

If the value has been assigned to the wrong cost element, you should change the account assignment for this operation.

If the value has been assigned to the right cost element, then maintain an assignment of the cost element and origin group in Customizing of Product Cost Planning.

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Porto
entry.content:
Dear Porto SAP Community, 

with the SAP CodeJam happening on Friday and the SAP Inside Track on Saturday, we would like to invite you to join us for a casual Meetup on Friday afternoon. This Meetup is a great opportunity to continue the discussion in a more informal setting, while enjoying a meal or a cold beverage with an amazing view. 

Earlier on this day, the CodeJam on Machine Learning using SAP HANA will take place. 

We also would like to invite everyone who will join the SAP Inside Track in Porto on Saturday, to get to know each other beforehand. 

The concrete location will be announced soon, but it will be in the area of Ribeira de Gaia. 

Let us know if you're joining by using the RSVP buttons on the right. 🙂 

Até breve! 

Your SAP Community Advocates
-------

Querida SAP Community no Porto,

com o SAP CodeJam a acontecer na sexta-feira e o SAP Inside Track no sábado, gostaríamos de convidá-vos para um encontro casual na tarde de sexta-feira. Este Meetup é uma ótima oportunidade para continuar as discussões em um ambiente mais informal, enquanto desfrutamos de um jantar o ou uma bebida com uma vista incrível.

No início deste dia, ocorrerá o CodeJam sobre Machine Learning utilizando SAP HANA.

Também gostaríamos de convidar todos que participarão do SAP Inside Track no Porto no sábado a se conhecerem antes do evento.

O local exato será anunciado em breve, mas será na área da Ribeira de Gaia.

Deixe-nos saber se você vai participar utilizando os botões de RSVP à direita. 🙂

Até breve!

Seus Advocates da Comunidade SAP

Any clues or advice?

SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello!  my linkedin profile https://it.linkedin.com/in/simonamiani

I am a 53 engineer (cybersecurity analyst-threat hunter) , happily married and mother of 2 kids 🙂  

After serving for 9 years  in public administration (civil),  I have re-started my professional career, stretching my technical competences and soft skills to come back into technology consulting, my first passion. I have participated in the work&study program of SANS and I gained the GSTRT (Giac). Now I am completing the studies to  the GCFA (Giac) and I am studying COSO, the Enterprise Risk Management framework, to apply cybersecurity analysis and strategic roadmap in finance sector. This year , I have also studied the inter blockchain protocol (obtaining a certification from Chainlink) and I have invested 3 months in the Applied Data Science program of MIT professional (obtaining the completion certificate with my final notebook in python and executive summary about market research). My professional goal is :  cyber risk  leader  for financial field. SAP HANA is the "real world"  tool, and I would like to enrich my curriculum with YOUR CERTIFICATION "SAP certified associate-data engineer-data fabric". Thanks for your kind attention, hoping  to hear from you soon, I am beginning  today my SAP learning journey!My best regards, Simona.

entry.title: Re: Malware Scanner in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for sharing your query. Basically, Cloud integration of the integration suite subsumes the malware service from the BTP. 

However, malware service from the BTP underneath uses the CLAMAV (open-source anti-virus engine).

if the malicious content is not detected on the upload in the cloud integration capability of the integration suite, it means CLAMAV is not capable to detect that specific virus. To check this, you can upload the same malicious content in this https://www.virustotal.com/gui/. It has many anti-virus hosted. One of them is CLAMAV. Here as well, content will not be detected as malicious.

Now I am completing the studies to  the GCFA (Giac) and I am studying COSO, the Enterprise Risk Management framework, to apply cybersecurity analysis and strategic roadmap in finance sector. This year , I have studied the inter blockchain protocol (obtaining a certification from Chainlink) and I have invested 3 months in the Applied Data Science program of MIT professional (obtaining the completion certificate with my final notebook in python and executive summary about market research). My professional goal is : consultant or intern  for cyber risk management and leadership  in financial field. SAP HANA is the "real world"  tool, and I would like to enrich my curriculum with YOUR CERTIFICATION "SAP certified associate-data engineer-data fabric". Thanks for your kind attention, my best regards, Simona.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

My name is Nguyen Vinh Y, and I am currently a third-year student in the Faculty of Information Systems at the University of Economics and Law (UEL). I am from Vietnam and still pursuing my studies, but I have a strong passion for ERP solutions and software development, particularly in the area of ABAP within SAP system.

As a Vietnamese student and a first-generation college attendee from my family, I aspire to contribute to the development of the IT field both domestically and internationally.

Becoming a professional ABAP developer is my goal for the future, and I believe that obtaining an SAP certification will help me enhance my skills and add greater value to the companies I will work for. I kindly ask you to consider my application for the SAP certification program.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Vinh Y

entry.title: Has anyone managed to use CPM effectively specifically when you've used it >1 performance year
entry.content:
We haven't pushed the use of CPM because during testing I came across a number of functionality limitations that made it feel under-developed.  All the guidance SAP provides is for using CPM fresh out of the box. Once you have used it for a while it starts to feel like there wasn't much thought to how it would be used long-term.

I am curious how people might have got around the following:

1. Being a large company with multiple organisations and CPM only working with one default goal plan?

2. Changing the default goal plan, and all activities from the previous year remaining in CPM under the Not aligned to a performance goal bucket. I can see that this list is going to very quickly get out of control. What is the user supposed to do? Delete everything one-by-one from the previous year?

3. Changing Default goal plans at the end of each year - means that the moment you change your default goal plan the activities are moved into the Not Aligned Bucket, but as most people will know we have a bit of a cross-over between end of year and beginning of year. We often are straddling two goal plans while people set their new objectives and finish their end of year activites. With a goal plan i can select the old one, but with CPM its a hard limit.

3. The Meeting functionality - it got some improvements but it still doesn't make sense how it would be utilised in practice. 

In my opinion, CPM should be configured similar to a performance form, in the way that you set a date range for it, and tag it to a goal plan. That way you could have CPM "sheets" or "forms" work with different goal plans, but also would then ringfence around activities created within that performance year. And it would create a clean and fresh CPM each year, with employees being able to go back and review historical years and activities.  You could even have a "copy activitiy from previous plan" functionality like on a goal plan.

entry.title: Text für Innergemeinschaftliches Verbringen/Lieferung im Formular
entry.content:
Hallo,

sehe ich das richtig, dass im Formular SD_INVOICE_FORM01 das Feld SUPPLEMENT_TEXT für z.B. steuerliche Texte wie für Innergemeinschaftliches Verbringen/Lieferung gedacht ist?

Oder welche Empfehlung für diese Pflichttexte gibt es seitens SAP?

Die Texte sind je nach Steuerschlüssel anzugeben und sind sprachabhängig.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
Markus

entry.title: Transfer of Payment file to SFTP via Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm seeking advice on how to establish a connectivity path for transferring payment files Via public cloud to clients SFTP. After executing the automatic payment program on public cloud , when payment is posted successfully I'm getting output of file in 'Payment Media' from where i can easily download the file.

After downloading the file from payment media, I upload it manually to the portal provided by the bank. This manual process works fine, but my client wants the file to be sent to its SFTP. Is there a way to automate this process?

The standard solution provided by SAP is 1EG, which is not applicable for Australia. Other scope items, 16R and 2YM, are licensed, and the client does not want to use them. 

Is there a solution other than 1EG, 16R, and 2YM that can be used to establish a connectivity path for transferring payment files via public cloud to clients' SFTP? I need to know the best possible way out which I can use for integration.

entry.title: Re: Table for Handling Unit Pack Status? (EWM/ECC)
entry.content: Try to look at the WT , you have dest. HU and Source HU

entry.title: Re: Net price in PO after exchange but in different currency
entry.content:
Yes, look at threads such as Currency on Purchase order 

Nevertheless, the amount should have been converted, how was it displayed on PR?

entry.title: Re: Improved location determination in SAP TM for STO enablement in ASR scenario
entry.content:
Hi Michael, 

Very detailed explanation. 

for a ASR/non ASR scenario,  if we have a 2 step STO where FO is created based on outbound delivery and later can we trigger a inbound delivery based on proof of pick up event from TM ? as there is already a delivery proposal for the FO, will it allow? 

 

Thanks,

Archana.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Profitability and Performance Management 3.0 SP25
entry.content:
Hi where can i find the pdf version of the sample content of SP25

OECD BEPS 2.0 Tax Calculation and Reporting Powered by SAP Group Reporting Data Collection

SXE

GR04

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Nghi. I'm a woman and a student in university. I want to upskill myself in SAP technology and get a job opportunity soon.

This is truly an amazing initiative by SAP and a great opportunity for me. I'm positively looking forward to hearing back from you.

Regards,

Nghi

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am excited to express my interest in participating in the Digital Skills Initiative. I have a background in accounting and have worked as a consultant for several local ERP companies. I am particularly interested in learning more about SAP FICO, as I believe it will significantly enhance my career prospects.

I see a great potential for SAP development in Vietnam, and I am eager to make it a focal point of my career. Additionally, I hope to contribute to connecting the SAP community in Vietnam, fostering collaboration and knowledge sharing among professionals.

I look forward to connecting with others in the community and gaining valuable insights along the way.

Thanks & Regards,

DUCTUYEN

entry.title: Re: Error CSRF Token Validation Failed in POST API
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

I am fetching csrf token successfully. Could you please guide me where I am missing to pass token to lo_http_client->set_csrf_token( ).

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Remove Assembled components DPP DMC
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried designing Production process to disassemble the assembled components. Its throwing an error saying "component not assembled" but the component is already assembled. 

Anyone faced this issue?

entry.title: Re: Webinar: SAP Business One - Uso Académico
entry.content:
Tiene interés en conocer más sobre nuestra solución SAP Business One para uso académico vía SAP University Alliances? Consulte esta info-sheet de ACC Sierre, Suiza. 

Y por cualquier otra consulta escríbannos ✍️ a sapnextgen@sap.com

entry.title: Re: GR error Cost element is not assigned to a cost compo...
entry.content:
• There are some similar KBAs available in OSS for transactions MM01 or CKMM, did you already check them?
  • Did you already look for forgotten transport requests (e.g. related to OKZT)

entry.title: Client Error: IF_HTTP_CLIENT object caused HTTP receive error: HTTP_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 I have created a custom class and i am calling the API of Maintenance order operation to get the operation data when i use GET Method  its working when i use POST Method its giving me below error . Its not fetching the token while POST. 

Client Error: IF_HTTP_CLIENT object caused HTTP receive error: HTTP_COMMUNICATION_FAILURE

if anyone faced the issue before can you please help and guide.
Thanks for your help
Nitin

entry.title: BTP Job Scheduling of different services
entry.content:
Hello, 

i have two CAP-Services (ODATA v4) on BTP CloudFoundry with some actions.
On both services i will call actions of the odata - service with jobscheduler.
For one service it works properly. But if i add a binding to the second service the scheduled jobs get error with JWT-Token.
So my question is: Is it possible to call actions on more than one service with one JobScheduler-Instance and if yes, what can be my error?

entry.title: Smart Data Streaming - KAFKA Adapter - Importing JSON array
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

My Question is regarding JSON Input Kafka Adapter. I want to know the possibility to import JSON array form kafka adapter. Sample JSON want to import from kafka adapter.


"items":
[
{
"item‑id":"10",
"item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00",
"item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59",
"sales_ord_num":"1234545457",
"quantity":12
},
{
"item‑id":"20",
"item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00",
"item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59",
"sales_ord_num":"1234545458",
"quantity":12
},
{
"item‑id":"30",
"item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00",
"item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59",
"sales_ord_num":"1234545459",
"quantity":12
},
{
"item‑id":"40",
"item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00",
"item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59",
"sales_ord_num":"1234545455",
"quantity":12
},
{
"item‑id":"50",
"item‑start‑date":"2024‑08‑07T07:00:00",
"item‑end‑date":"2025‑08‑07T06:59:59",
"sales_ord_num":"1234545454",
"quantity":12
}
]

How I can import all 5 Lines from array items[] into Input Stream. Can any one please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Net price in PO after exchange but in different currency
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi- PR  was in PLN

entry.title: Re: Malware Scanner in Integration Suite
entry.content:
Thanks for your reply. We have contacted SAP Consultant and he was reverting back the same just 2 days ago. But we have observed, that the virus has been detected using the URL you have shared, but Integration Suite doesn't detected it - my SAP Consultant has created an incident internally already to get this fixed.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano

I am a man , my name is bahaa and I'm excited to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work for an organization called Edraky,
which is focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. I'm writing to apply for certification  Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionC_S4CPB.

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload using RAP: Part -3
entry.content:
@amitgoyal @rex 

For this error, check whether the npm i xlsx command was given from main project folder .For me the error is gone when I ran it from user/projects instead of the current app folder.

entry.title: Re: How to get URL parameters in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
Yes,

SAP Screen Personas scripting doesn't have any objects to operate with URL. 
BUT you can use Javascript and window object to retrieve needed parameter. 

Try this:

/* globals console, window, URLSearchParams */
const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
console.log(params.get('sap-theme'));

If this doesn't work for you, search similar solution.

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: special Keyfigure calculation in BW query designer
entry.content:
Hello,

there are multiple possible ways to do this. For a simple use case, you could duplicate the keyfigure selection and have it be cumulated in the selection properties. 

Another option would be to use a CURRENT MEMBER Variable for your time dimension and restrict your  keyfigure on an interval from the first month of the year to the current one for each row using said variable. Check out a more detailed description to solve your problem with CURRENT MEMBER here and here(YTD analysis).

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I’m an SAP Business One administrator based in Sialkot, Pakistan, and I hold a degree in computer science. I'm eager to enhance my expertise within the SAP ecosystem, especially in SAP Analytics Cloud. The digital skills initiative by SAP Learning presents a wonderful opportunity for individuals like me to grow and develop. I’m excited about the prospect of taking on this challenge and pursuing SAP Certification.

Thank you for considering my interest in this initiative.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I am Habiba, and I am thrilled to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work for an organization called Edraky, which specializes in delivering comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. I am writing to apply for the certification Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (C_S4CPB).

Looking forward to your response.

entry.title: Re: Malware Scanner in Integration Suite
entry.content: I think the SAP Consultant is Bousselmi, Samir. Right? I would suggest getting in touch with him for latest update.

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM/SAC Support for SAC roles and TEAM liaison in IDM
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have similar requirement using IPS and SAC.

However we are stuck is 2 issues:

Issue 1: When Version 1 is used - We have issue that the user is not able to login to SAC after the id is created in SAC. The user id needs to be deactivated and activated again in SAC and then it starts working.

Issue 2: When Version 2 is used - The team gets created in SAC, user gets tagged. But the SAC roles tagged to team gets detagged.

 

Can someone please assist how this can be fixed?

 

Regards,

Sayed Zubair

entry.title: Re: Malware Scanner in Integration Suite
entry.content: Yes exactly 🙂

entry.title: Re: GR error Cost element is not assigned to a cost compo...
entry.content: Hello Raymond, Thanks for yoour reply. The OKZT settings in Quality and Production are the same. GR posting is possible in Quality, but not in Production.

entry.title: Re: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Instance sharing | 'reference' service plan
entry.content:
Hi @antoniojmnunes ,

excellent blog on the topic. We looked into PostgreSQL instance sharing last June/July but were unsuccessful. Now that it's been added to the official documentation, and with your step-by-step, we would very much like to pursue this path and be able to share the instance across accounts.

We are, however, unable to add the 'reference' entitlement in any of our accounts, it's just not there. We have a Partners Global account with a Pay-As-You-Go pricing option. Could this be the reason? Maybe a roll out hasn't yet been done for every account type?

Please let us know if you have some input on this. Thanks!

BR,

Gonçalo

entry.title: Re: Hands-On Tutorial: Predictive Planning
entry.content:
Hello,

where can I download the csv file?

Thanks 🙂

entry.title: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using Crystal Reports to make a Sales Quotation layout.

In the DETAILS section, i have the lines of the sales quotation.

In the REPORT FOOTER section, i have subtotals, VAT, discounts...

The porblem is with the number of items per page.

I have a quotation with 57 lines.

In the report, i get HEADER, 57 lines and PAGE FOOTER in the first page, and the second page has HEADER, FOOTERS and a big blank space between both, since there are no more lines to print.

I can change the height of DETAILS saction manually, but i will get the same problem with a 40 lines sales quotation, for example.

What i want to do is make a variable field / section height depending on the number of lines.
Is it possible?

Thanks.

Victor

entry.title: Re: 🚀 Welcome to the SAP Community Group – Pune! 🚀
entry.content: Thanks @Punith_Oswal. I’m excited to be part of this community and look forward to many more memorable events.

entry.title: Re: Hands-On Tutorial: Predictive Planning
entry.content:
Hi @YvonneT 

The data file used in this article can be found here: https://github.com/antoinechabert/predictive/blob/master/product_forecast_planning.csv. Enjoy!

Best 

Antoine

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP: How to set up alert on database resident mem...
entry.content: Have you checked the functionality that you could get by using SAP Cloud ALM for HANA Cloud at https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-mon-content.html?anchorId=section?

entry.title: Payslip read out loud for visually impaired
entry.content:
I am managing an implementation of EC and payroll where my customer has stumbled upon issues with read out loud functionality for payslips. If for example "-" and a number has a space between them, it is not read out as a negative number, which is what they would like. An account number will also be read out like a immensely bit number instead of being grouped in a way that make sense or just as a sequence of separate digits. I wonder if anybody knows existing solutions to this issue, or whether or not SAP is paying attention to ensuring that documents generated will work with immersive readers or browser plugins.

HCM Payroll

entry.title: Re: EWM PI Creation Error - No items Passed on
entry.content: Hi,On the PI_CREATE screen after entering the bin detail you are supposed to press the set flag before save. Click on the set flag which will change the status to green and then you can save it

entry.title: Re: Import into node dev_node failed. - Error during client creation: Not Found
entry.content: You have to provide more details. With that little information it will not be possible to help you.

entry.title: Re: PurRqs will be generated when Available Qty -1000 always
entry.content: Hi Stocki. Here is Plant Stock of this material. I cannot see any pending on quality status.

entry.title: i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually
entry.content: In SAP Business One, if ihave a purchase order with many items and i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually for each line or using Excel

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

 

My name is Huy, and currently I am taking a role as a Basis consultant.
Yesterday I was glad that I found the announcement from my friend with this program to get a voucher, which is part of keeping me growing up every day to become a better consultant.
I am also writing to apply for a certificate SAP Certified Associate - Database Administrator - SAP HANA

Thanks and best regards,

Huy
